top_signals.title: Nebius stock surges as Nvidia discloses 9.3% stake in neocloud
top_signals.summary: Nvidia said it would invest $2 billion into Nebius in March.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Danantara Hires Banks for Planned Second Dollar Bond Sale
top_signals.summary: Indonesia’s sovereign wealth fund Danantara has mandated banks to sound out investor demand for a potential sale of long-dated dollar bonds, weeks after completing its first offshore debt offering.

top_signals.title: Zalando Avoids Fine as German Regulator Ends Disclosure Probe
top_signals.summary: Germany’s financial regulator concluded a review into Zalando SE over a missing disclosure in its annual report without imposing a fine.

top_signals.title: IHT receipts hit record high as Rachel Reeves’ frozen bands raid plague Brits
top_signals.summary: Inheritance tax receipts soared to a record high in the three months to June 2026, as frozen thresholds drag more Brits into the net. Receipts hit £2.3bn over the period, according to the latest figures from HMRC, a £96m increase from the same period last year. In June alone inheritance tax (IHT) receipts totalled £871m [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
